title: DKIM
helpOutput:
Usage: dkim [<options>] <selector-or-domain> [<domain>]

  Look up DKIM records or discover common DKIM selectors.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -d, --discover       Auto-discover DKIM selectors by probing common selector
                       names
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <selector-or-domain>  DKIM selector when looking up a specific record, or
                        domain when using --discover
  <domain>              Domain name (required when providing a selector)
